meta.description: With membership at XYPN, Your dream RIA is one affordable fee away. Choose Emerald for core benefits like compliance, tech, support, education, and advocacy—all with transparent pricing.

FULL BENEFITS & FLEXIBILITY TO ADD-ON
Your Independence, Simplified
Your dream firm is one affordable monthly fee away. As an Emerald member of XYPN, you’ll have access to everything included with Membership as well as exclusive, members-only discounts with XYPN partners.
Scale to suit your growing business needs with our Bookkeeping, Compliance, and Investment Management Support Solutions and Tool Kits—all priced to provide the best Return On Independence for fee-only advisors.

XYPN Makes it Possible
XYPN is the only advisor support platform that makes it possible for independent, fee-only financial planners to build the firm of their dreams with complete autonomy. We do this through ongoing advocacy and access to education and training, curated technology, compliance support, like-minded community, and back-office and client support services.
